title: koeleria cristata var. gracilis
intro: Koeleria cristata var. gracilis, also known as the slender hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. gracilis include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as constipation and bloating, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Koeleria cristata var. gracilis is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can be used to treat a variety of health issues, making it a valuable addition to natural medicine.
